name_cn:
Real shot,
24 model Rocking Horse Handbag
A structured soft tote bag,
Croc-embossed calfskin, soft suede lining,
Creating a luxurious yet understated texture.
Features a "b" letter closure,
And the EKD embossed print on the back. This bag is highly practical, can be used as a tote bag,
And also comes with a detachable and adjustable shoulder strap for crossbody use.
Perfect for daily commuting, client meetings, or attending events!
